---
title: "CAX_Analysis"
author: "Jordan Heinlein"
date: "2026-03-19"
output: pdf_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE); library(viridis)
```

# Setup 
```{r}
library(here);library(tidyverse)


CAX_Ca_Jul31 <- read.csv(here("Data/CAX/CAX.Ca.Jul31[1].out"), stringsAsFactors = TRUE) %>% 
  select(biomassC) %>% 
  mutate(Treatment = "Ca")

CAX_Calld_Jul31 <- read.csv(here("Data/CAX/CAX.Calld.Jul31[1].out"), stringsAsFactors = TRUE) %>% 
  select(biomassC) %>% 
  mutate(Treatment = "Calld")

CAX_Calli_Jul31 <- read.csv(here("Data/CAX/CAX.Calli.Jul31[1].out"), stringsAsFactors = TRUE) %>% 
  select(biomassC) %>% 
  mutate(Treatment = "Calli")

CAX_Pptd_Jul31 <- read.csv(here("Data/CAX/CAX.Pptd.Jul31[1].out"), stringsAsFactors = TRUE) %>% 
  select(biomassC) %>% 
  mutate(Treatment = "Pptd")

CAX_Ppti_Jul31 <- read.csv(here("Data/CAX/CAX.Ppti.Jul31.out"), stringsAsFactors = TRUE) %>% 
  select(biomassC) %>% 
  mutate(Treatment = "Ppti")

CAX_T_Jul31 <- read.csv(here("Data/CAX/CAX.T.Jul31[1].out"), stringsAsFactors = TRUE) %>% 
  select(biomassC) %>% 
  mutate(Treatment = "T")

CAX_combined <- bind_rows(CAX_Ca_Jul31,
                          CAX_Calld_Jul31,
                          CAX_Calli_Jul31,
                          CAX_Pptd_Jul31,
                          CAX_Ppti_Jul31,
                          CAX_T_Jul31)

CAX_biommasC_dist <- ggplot(data = CAX_combined, aes(x= Treatment, y= biomassC, fill = Treatment))+
  geom_violin(width= 1)+
  geom_boxplot(width= 0.1, color = "white", alpha= 0.2)+
  scale_fill_viridis(discrete = TRUE)+
  theme_bw()+
  labs(y= "Vegetation Carbon Biomass (g/m2)",
       title = "Carbon Biomass Accumulation over 100 years by Treatment Type",
       subtitle = "Caxiuana National Tropical Rainforest, Para, Brazil",
       caption="Ca: Doubling of atmospheric CO2.\nCalld: CO2 doubling, 3.5 degrees Celsius warming, and 20% decrease in precipitation.\nCalli: CO2 doubling, 3.5 degrees Celsius warming, and 20% increase in precipitation.\nPptd: 20% decrease in precipitation.\nPPti: 20% increase in precipitation.\nT:3.5 degrees Celsius warming.")+
  theme(plot.caption = element_text( hjust = 0))
  
print(CAX_biommasC_dist)
```
